title: LIKE join: BATfetchjoin does not hit always
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR, description VARCHAR DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, description) VALUES ('example', 'This is an example entry');
INSERT INTO test_table (name, description) VALUES ('sample', NULL);
CREATE TABLE join_table (join_id SERIAL, join_name VARCHAR NOT NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_table JOIN join_table ON test_table.name LIKE join_table.join_name;
key_bug_features: LIKE join with variable does not always return results
